shadows.name: workspace-ambient
shadows.purpose: Active notebook and graph work surfaces.

shadows.name: raised-control
shadows.purpose: Primary actions and floating editing tools.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Selection, hover, and graph detail changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action on a scan or study screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 1px solid #4d0e12; border-radius: 12px; padding: 15px 18px; background: #4d0e12; color: #fffdf8; font: 800 11px/1.2 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; transition: transform 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 22px #4d0e1228; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #4d0e12; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { border: 1px solid #d9cec0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 17px; background: #fffdf8; color: #4d0e12; font: 800 11px/1.2 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f7f3ed; border-color: #4d0e12; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #4d0e12; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Notebook Field
components.description: An editable concept or note label.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #4d0e12; font: 800 11px/1.2 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-field input { padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #d9cec0; border-radius: 8px; background: #fffdf8; color: #3f3b36; font: 400 16px/1.4 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #a5bcd666; border-color: #4d0e12; }

components.name: Concept Node
components.description: A concise graph node tied to scanned notebook content.
components.css: .ds-concept-node { display: grid; gap: 5px; min-width: 150px; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid #a5bcd6; border-radius: 12px; background: #fffdf8; color: #3f3b36; text-align: left; } .ds-concept-node span { font: 800 14px/1.25 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-concept-node small { color: #746d65; font: 800 10px/1 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-concept-node:hover { background: #f7f3ed; } .ds-concept-node:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #4d0e12; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Study Navigation
components.description: Compact navigation between scanned pages, notes, graph, and cards.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 28px; color: #746d65; font: 800 11px/1.2 Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-nav a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a.active { color: #4d0e12; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #4d0e12; outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: Traceback should feel like a carefully organized notebook coming alive. Warm paper, faint ruled structure, burgundy ink, and soft blue marks preserve the familiarity of handwritten study while making relationships clear and interactive.
keyCharacteristics: Warm stationery surfaces with restrained academic color.
Familiar product controls paired with notebook-specific details.
Clear selected states and readable relationship lines.
Ambient depth around major work surfaces, not every element.

rules.name: The Ink-and-Rule Rule
rules.body: Burgundy signals action or connection; blue signals detected or selected notebook material.

rules.name: The Handwritten Accent Rule
rules.body: Serif italics identify notebook content; they never label controls, navigation, or graph tooling.

rules.name: The One-Surface Rule
rules.body: Elevate the active workspace, not every node, row, or label.

dos: Do preserve the warm paper, burgundy ink, ruled-blue, and graphite hierarchy.
Do use standard buttons, tabs, drawers, and keyboard navigation.
Do keep graph nodes concise and reveal detail on selection.
Do pair color with labels, outlines, or shapes.
donts: Don't use generic AI interfaces or decorative complexity.
Don't make the concept graph feel like a specialist data-analysis tool.
Don't place every node inside a shadowed card.
Don't use gradients, glassmorphism, neon graph lines, or decorative motion.
